title: carex heleonastes subsp. neurochlaena
intro: Carex heleonastes subsp. neurochlaena is a subspecies of sedge, a type of perennial grass-like plant, known for its distinctive appearance and medicinal properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex heleonastes subsp. neurochlaena include relieving coughs and colds, reducing fever and body temperature, and easing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
